entry.title: His Batman
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: Before Wayne Manor, Jason used to have nightmares. He’d dream about old clients, both regulars and one-offs; all the degradation and abuse he’d suffered at their hands. Ever since he started living in the manor—since becoming Robin—Jason has rarely had those dreams. Still—occasionally—when times are bad, when old habits get the better of him, when the expectations of the job become suffocating, or tensions arise, or even just when regular spells of self-doubt invade his mind, the nightmares come back with a vengeance. Like an old, forgotten client grinning, saying, Do you really think you can escape your past? You might look and act like Robin, but you’ll never be Robin. He’s never told anyone about those dreams, not even Dick. Some things even Batman can’t know. But when Jason nearly kills himself trying to save some kids from a collapsed building, he wonders if Dick has known all along. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 6: Batman Dick

entry.title: When you try to ignore your homosexual feelings toward your younger brother
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: Jason is struggling to accept that Dick is growing up, all he hears now is where he's planning to go to college and move away for an indefinite amount of time away from everyone including him, it makes Jason uneasy, his stomach churning at the thought of the little bunny being away from him. He's just..concerned that's all.

entry.title: even in arcadia you walk beside me still
entry.summary:
Author: jikkyuu

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,105Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: "So he woke up buried alive," Dick whispered in reply. He couldn't stop imagining what it must have felt like, to go through such terrors and end up discarded, alone, hidden six feet under. For a moment, only Alfred's breath was audible through the device. Then— "I was there," he said, slowly, "during master Jason's autopsy. He was…" "But now he's not." Dick did not want to dwell on that. There were more important things he needed to do, right away. -- Dickjay Week 2026 Day 4: Amnesiac/Catatonic Jason

entry.title: Mr. Knightley
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,046Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 6) Batman Dick/Knightfight | Fake/Accidental Marriage | Public Sex | "So I'm your dirty little secret?"He doesn't recognize the number, but the area code comes from the UK, so out of pure curiosity, he plugs the phone into a charger and goes to look for some cereal. It's not been 15 minutes when the burner rings again, he picks it up, and a calm male voice says, 'Hello, Mr. Knightley?' He does a quick run over the people who know that name and have that phone, but as far as he knows, there should be none. He says yes, either way, willing to see how far this goes. 'I'm Nurse Haynsworth, calling you from The Royal Victoria Infirmary, regarding your husband.' He moves back to his office and turns on his laptop, quickly searching the name and finding a hospital in Newcastle upon Tyne in the UK. 'There was an explosion, and your husband was caught in it. As his next of kin, we require your presence, Sir.' He does not have a husband.

entry.title: It's a blessing sir, you can't take it back!
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,896Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 5) Incubi/Succubi | Accidental/Unwanted Soul Bond | Dollification | Time Travel Fix-ItThe Goddess Arthkert has blessed him, they say. It's an incredibly rare gift, they say. A once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, they say. No, we can't take it back, they fucking say. He tries to tell them he is his brother, his estranged little brother at that, but they simply say that the Goddess does not make mistakes, and that if it's meant to be, then it's meant to be.An entire Solar System away, Jason still hasn't noticed anything strange.

entry.title: With This Ring, I Thee Bite
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,784Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 124

Summary: "Is he... is he okay?" Kyle asked, noticing the change in Dick's demeanour. “Please tell me you didn’t lobotomise Nightwing, Jason.”"Uh. Define 'okay,'" Jason replied, wincing as Dick adjusted his bite, teeth still firmly embedded but no longer pressing as hard. "He's not trying to dissolve us with plasma anymore, but he's also cosplaying as a space leech on my neck. So, you know. You win some, you lose some?"DickJay Week 2026 - Day 5 - Accidental/Unwanted Soul Bond

entry.title: The One and the Only Companion
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,924Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 92

Summary: Dick finds a human-sized doll in the Batcave that looks just like Jason. It’s wearing Jason’s clothes, or what looks like Jason’s clothes. It has Jason's short black hair, Jason's baby face, and the graceful length of Jason's body. If Jason were a life-sized doll, this is exactly what he would look like. The strangest part, Dick thinks a little uneasily, is that no one has seen the real Jason for a while now. That can't be a coincidence, can it? Bruce doesn’t want to tell Dick where he got the doll or how it was made. But if you want it, he says, you can take it home and use it as you wish. So that’s exactly what Dick does. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 5: Dollification

entry.title: Remember to remember me
entry.summary:
Author: LaundryBasket (LaundryBasket____LuLuGal)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,915Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 500

Summary: It starts with Dick forgetting his keys. It’s something Jason easily brushes aside, even when Dick forgets to get groceries and of all things his shoes one day it’s something they can chalk up to stress or lack of sleep. What really gets Jason concerned (not worried) is when Dick casually calls, asking for their apartment number after wandering the street for over an hour. Since the apartment incident Jason’s been paying a lot closer attention. Maybe too close as Dick has commented on. Jason finally decided he’s overreacting…until the night he’s woken up from the sound of glass breaking. OR Dick is beginning to have issues with his memory, Jason is there through it all and they realize their relationship goes deeper than either of them thought, memory or not.

entry.title: Little Red Rabbit Hood
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,144Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: Gotham at night. If a city is an urban jungle, Gotham is a haunted forest. Cloaked in rain and mist like wraiths. The rooftops a glittering canopy, the streets an underbelly crawling with creatures of the night. Creatures of intentions ill and noble alike. Red Hood stands somewhere in between. The smallest sound scuffs on the rooftop behind him, and his lop ears flick under his hood. He doesn't move, doesn't betray his alert. His body stays still and relaxed. Still, whoever moved seems to know they've been found, as they don't try to hide the splash of their footsteps approaching him. Casual. Not an enemy then. Or at least not someone who means immediate harm. His perked ears relax, and he finally looks up, over his shoulder. Black and vibrant blue. A thousand-watt grin. Jason rolls his eyes and looks back at the drop site. "What do you want, Dickhead?"-----DickJay Week Day 3 Prompts Fairytale Retelling | Animal Hybrid/Features | Incest Kink | Escaping Arranged Marriage

entry.title: Freely Given
entry.summary:
Author: letsgooutintherain

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,333Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 37

Summary: Dick could still see it: The way Jason had gone feral, body rigid, shift washing over him, sharpening his nails to claws. Batman coming down from the rafters, taking Jason down. The absolute terror on Jason's face when he'd come back to himself, unable to make his limbs move with Batman's teeth on his neck, forcing his submission. Dick knew that in wolf gangs fights for dominance were commonly ended with teeth on necks, knew that rogues used it on their victims and some parents on their children. But for all that Dick had spent half his childhood under the roof of a wolf shifter, had fought rogues for most of his life, he had never seen a submission bite outside of a scene. He didn't know how to make this right, but he couldn't not try.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 162,676Chapters: 60/?Kudos: 361

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: Mission: Get Dick Pregnant
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,151Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 42

Summary: Dick gets shot during a mission and a doctors tells Bruce he's had a miscarriage. This is 2 months after the sex pollen thing but Dick didn't know about it.Bruce is feeling guilty for everything that's happened, and when Dick feels better and goes back home, they all have A Very Important Talk.Turns out, after a lot of thinking, Dick wants to try to get pregnant... this time intentionally. And he wants Bruce to reverse his vasectomy!How will this affect their lives? How will their friends and other heroes act when it's known a few intimate details about their whole relationship?

entry.title: Three Is Greater Than Two
entry.summary:
Author: parkerwritesfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,748Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 60

Summary: Dick didn’t want Tim to get the wrong idea, that his being with Jason meant that Dick and Tim couldn’t also happen. He needed to dispel that notion fast. He needed to show Tim how much he liked him, how much he wanted, needed him.Dick and Jason are secretly fucking. Each of them, in turn, starts seeing Tim, too, who has known all along, and all three end up on a collision course headed towards the bedroom.

entry.title: Did You Give My Dog Chicken?!
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,096Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 31
